entities.name: DREB1A
entities.description: A gene that increases water uptake and modifies the root/shoot ratio in groundnut under water deficit conditions

entities.name: WATER UPTAKE
entities.description: The process of absorbing water from the soil, a key component of yield architecture

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea, the crop being studied for water use efficiency and yield

entities.name: ROOT/SHOOT RATIO
entities.description: The ratio of root biomass to shoot biomass, modified by DREB1A

entities.name: WATER DEFICIT
entities.description: A condition of limited water availability that affects yield and plant traits

entities.name: BIOMASS
entities.description: The total mass of the plant, part of the yield architecture

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of harvested grain to total above-ground biomass

entities.name: YIELD ARCHITECTURE
entities.description: The set of key components, including water uptake and harvest index, that determine overall yield

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, involved in groundnut breeding

entities.name: WATER USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which a plant converts water into biomass and yield

entities.name: EVAPOTRANSPIRATION EFFICIENCY
entities.description: A major component of water use efficiency used as a selection criterion

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: The total yield of pods in groundnut, influenced by water use efficiency

entities.name: TRAIT-BASED APPROACH
entities.description: A selection method using surrogates of evapotranspiration efficiency

entities.name: YIELD-BASED APPROACH
entities.description: A selection method based on yield performance under water deficit
